name: SpawnTorgen
_source: s;Jasper;Torgen, I'm gonna level wit' ya.|Why bother coming back here?|Those Medean banners we saw could mean anythin'.
s;Sphene;Yeah, it's been{br}months now.|Your little girlfriend's probably long gone,|and Medeas finally decided to do something about it.
s;Torgen;If she was dead, why would the royal family wait 'til NOW to do something, huh?|She's still out there,{br}and this just proves it.
s;Jasper;Man, you didn't yell at us fer callin' the princess your girlfriend.|Yer real serious about this.
s;Torgen;Of course I am! Besides, you've been hearing the rumors, right?|How the Council's been doubling the bounties lately?|It's all connected. I can feel it.
s;Sphene;Hm, yeah, ya got a point.|{c:e;Sphene;NormalBlink,Smile}Well, boss, if you wanna check things out, we're right behind ya.
s;Jasper;Besides, even if it ain't her, we can still collect that bounty!
